subcodes.first_line: Before the presence of my grandmother and mother it is mentioned that, praised be God, I am in good health and have no desire save divine contentment [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هو الاکبر. حضور جده و والده ذکر میشود که الحمد لله حیات صحت را دارم و تمنائی جز رضای الهی نیست
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @consolation and comfort, @personal instructions, @return of the Manifestations of God
